infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Simply Cosmetics Facts scans product barcodes with your camera to look up ingredients and safety information. For example, scan a moisturizer or shampoo to check for parabens, fragrance, or other concerning ingredients. Photos are not saved or shared—we only use the barcode number to retrieve product information.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app does not use your contacts.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app does not use your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: This app does not use your calendar.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need access to your microphone to record audio.
